summary: Updates-04 deployment validated - most components working, some issues identified

requirementsValidation.name: CampSessionCard, CampSessionCardGrid components
requirementsValidation.evidence: summer-camp page shows 4 session cards (Primary Overnight, Junior Camp, Jr. High Camp, Sr. High Camp) with images and bullet features

requirementsValidation.name: WideCard, WorkAtCampSection components
requirementsValidation.evidence: Components exist but may need content update to display on homepage
requirementsValidation.note: Work at Camp section not visible on homepage in current content

requirementsValidation.name: ColorPicker with theme presets
requirementsValidation.evidence: Cannot verify without Keystatic admin authentication
requirementsValidation.note: Manual verification via Chrome extension needed

requirementsValidation.name: Container width/height/background options
requirementsValidation.evidence: Cannot verify without Keystatic admin authentication
requirementsValidation.note: Manual verification via Chrome extension needed

requirementsValidation.name: Icon size options
requirementsValidation.evidence: 19 SVG icons found on testing-components page

requirementsValidation.name: Hero height options (tall = 576px)
requirementsValidation.evidence: Hero on /summer-camp-what-to-bring shows 288px height, expected 576px for tall setting
requirementsValidation.note: Hero may need content update to use tall setting, or CSS not applied

requirementsValidation.name: Admin nav visibility
requirementsValidation.evidence: Admin nav not visible (expected for unauthenticated users). AdminNavStrip requires /api/auth/check to return isAdmin:true. API responds correctly with isAdmin:false for unauthenticated requests.
requirementsValidation.note: REQUIRES MANUAL TESTING: User must log into Keystatic/GitHub OAuth to verify admin nav appears. The requirements issue may be related to auth session persistence or cookie handling.

requirementsValidation.name: Faith section image priority loading
requirementsValidation.evidence: mission-background.jpg has fetchPriority='high' but loading not set to eager. Other section images use lazy loading.
requirementsValidation.note: Main mission image has high priority, but may still appear to load late

issuesSummary.issue: Admin nav not rendering for authenticated users (per requirements issue)
issuesSummary.location: Homepage and all pages - AdminNavStrip component
issuesSummary.recommendation: MANUAL TEST REQUIRED: Login to Keystatic, then check if admin nav strip appears. If still missing, investigate isKeystatiAuthenticated() function and cookie handling.

issuesSummary.issue: Hero height not 576px on What to Bring page
issuesSummary.recommendation: Verify heroHeight field is set to 'tall' in CMS content

issuesSummary.issue: CMS features cannot be validated without admin access
issuesSummary.recommendation: Manual verification needed via authenticated browser session

workingFeatures: Homepage hero video plays (autoplay, muted, loop)
Summer Camp page has YouTube embed working
Camp session cards display with 4 sessions
Testing components page shows 12 component types
Register Now button visible and linked
nextSteps: 1. MANUAL TEST: Login to Keystatic, verify admin nav appears on main site pages
2. Update What to Bring page heroHeight to 'tall' in CMS (currently 288px, should be 576px)
3. Manually verify CMS ColorPicker and container options via authenticated session
4. Add Work at Camp section content to homepage if desired
5. Consider adding loading='eager' to Faith section image for faster above-fold rendering
